source.reference: 9x39mm SP-5 247gr subsonic FMJ. G7 BC~0.118 (Litz estimate for heavy subsonic, comparable to .300 BLK 220gr). Muzzle velocity ~290 m/s. Litz, Applied Ballistics for Long Range Shooting, §9.5 (subsonic BC estimation).
source.methodology: BC values sourced from Bryan Litz's Applied Ballistics published Doppler radar measurements and form factor analysis.
